---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ""
---

## Problem
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the feature you'd like to see. Include UI sketches, API shapes, or SQL changes if relevant. -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why did you reject them? -->

## Affected Components
- [ ] Backend (Rust)
- [ ] Frontend (SvelteKit)
- [ ] Database schema
- [ ] Blind Email Relay
- [ ] Docker / Infra
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context
<!-- Anything else? Screenshots, links to research, related issues. -->

## Willingness to Contribute
- [ ] I'm willing to open a PR for this.
- [ ] I can help review the implementation.
- [ ] I just want to suggest it.
